page_content:
Formerly: PUAF735.

PLCY736 Managing Social Services (3 Credits)

Focuses on managing social services across federal, state, and local Jurisdictions with an emphasis on how strong management can improve results. Exposes students to management thought and philosophy

as applied to different social services and social policy challanges within various operating environments and programmatic settings. The watchwords for this course are "management” and "applied". Restriction: Must be in a major in PLCY-School of Public Policy; or permission of PLCY-School of Public Policy.

Credit Only Granted for. PUAF736, PLCY736 or PUAF698V.
